song.title: The Best Love for the Lord
song.author: Harris Gumulja
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G D G Em Loving You, Lord’s all I’m living for; .C D G Loving You, Lord to the uttermost. .D/F# Em G C Lord, forgive me if I’ve left my first love, . Am D That’s the bridal love to You.|| .G D G Em You are more than anyone I love. .C D G You are more than anything I have. .D/F# Em G C Even my dear self, Nothing can compare . Am D To my beloved Bridegroom.
[C] . Em D C G I give You the first place in all things by faith. . Am C D Let nothing take Your place in all my heart. . C D G C Infuse me with Yourself abundantly . G C Am ’Til we meet dear Lord. . D G I’ll love You with the best love. --- [V2] You’ve the right to take all that I love, But replace it with Yourself much more. You are what I need, Give Yourself to me, Do not give all that I want.|| Everything is sure to pass away, Everyone is going their own way. But I still have You and You have me too, Loving one another’s sweet.
[V3] I treasure my time alone with You, Just to gain the best love You long for. My dearest Husband, Draw me with Yourself Into Your chambers right now.|| Be the first in all my work and life, Be the first in all my service too. In relationships, You must be the first; Have preeminence in me.
